episode_summary: A Little Fish grab‑bag of listener-submitted curios ranges from a daylight saving time double arrest and surprising tech latency to nominative determinism in Canadian local politics and biodiversity in UK territories, plus many more animal and historical oddities in a rapid-fire custodianship segment. The hosts riff on names, newspapers, tennis scoring quirks, and unusual animal sleep strategies along the way.

facts.fact: He was arrested and released on bail. And now, a later, at 108 AM, the same cop arrested the same man for drunk driving.
